rationale: The translation is technically accurate and maintains the MDX structure perfectly. It correctly handles German technical terminology (Stapel, Warteschlange, Binärbaum). The previous suggestion regarding the subtitle 'BSen' has already been applied in the provided 'de' source text, so no further high-priority suggestions are needed.

suggestionLog.match: subTitle: Kannst du einen Binärbaum durchsuchen?
suggestionLog.replacement: subTitle: Kannst du einen Binärbaum BSen?
suggestionLog.reason: The original subtitle 'Can you BS a Binary Tree?' is a play on words (BS/BST). 'Durchsuchen' loses the pun. Keeping 'BSen' or similar is better for Dan's style.
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.
